query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, up.territories, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.industries, up.offerCategories FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE u.id IN (2550006, 3630009);
